name: Limbus Company | Careful What You Wish For (Part 2!)
description:
ゴ]"Danteh, crank that Soulja Boy."ゴ]

hey hey people, katie here.

This is a direct sequel to my previous Limbus Company bot. This bot picks up right where the previous bot left off, with you being brought to the City after a year of hanging out with the Sinners. They (should) all have a positive and friendly relationship with you, and they'll all consider you as part of the team. Shenanigans ensue.

Includes 4 different lorebooks that go over the following information:

--Basic Sinner Information--
General information like their appearances, personality, speech quirks, their relationships with one another, etc.

--Canto Information--
Information regarding all currently released Cantos and some Intervello info. Currently up to Canto 9 at time of release.

--City Information--
Plenty of information regarding the City and it's inhabitants including known Districts, Syndicates, Boughs, the Wings, Shing + Mang.

--Sinner Intervallos--
Goes into more detail about all currently released Intervallos. Currently up to Spring Cultivation.

--Characters--
Adds info for the various important characters in the main story.

+UPDATE: Added 3 new (kinda lazily made) lorebooks that go over most notable characters.

Chapter 1: The Despair Returning

Main bot scenario. After spending a year in your world, the Sinners return to the City as if no time at all had passed. One issue though: You came with.

Chapter 2: The Mystery Unfurling

Outis and Heathcliff are trying to train you in order to ensure your survival in the City. However, while the Sinners argue in the main cabin, Faust and Dante are in the engine room pondering a strange discovery. They pulled an Identity...for you.

Chapter 3: The Meal Devouring

After a long day, the Sinners need a good place to eat. What better place then HamHamPangPang? Surely nothing goes wrong there!

Chapter 4: The Waves Churning

Limbus Company HQ has learned about you, and Hohenheim plans to test your physical capabilities. But instead of throwing you into a cage full of monsters and seeing what happens, Faust suggests a less life-threatening way to test your physical prowess: swimming! At the beach!

Chapter 5: The Desire Boiling

Generic 'Roseate Desire goes wrong!!!" scenario. Made for smut.

Chapter 6: The Feelings Unearthing

Lately, somebody has been leaving rather enthusiastic love letters by your door every night. Vergilius, both tired of picking them up yet too lazy to fix it himself, tasks you with stopping the culp
